qa_matrix.question_text: Member Name
Member Date of Birth
Education Qualification
Your current Occupation
ID Proof Aadhar
Kindly share your current location( City and state with country)?

DECLARATION: You Taranjeet Kaur Chawla , declare that, you have fully understood the questions asked to you as per this call and have furnished complete, true and accurate information after fully understanding the same. Sir/Mam' are you in agreement with the declaration that I have read out to you.
In the last 24 months, have you smoked or used any tobacco or nicotine products?
Do you consume alcohol ?
Have you ever been advised by a doctor to reduce or stop alcohol consumption ?
Have you ever used recreational drugs or Narcotics that was not prescribed by a Licensed physician ?
What is Proposed insured height (cm)?
What is Proposed Insured weight (kg)?
High/Low blood pressure, raised cholesterol or triglycerides or lipids

Chest pain or heaviness or discomfort, heart murmur, heart attack, coronary artery disease, Heart valve disorder, congenital heart disease, palpitation, rheumatic fever, shortness of breath or any other heart conditions
Cancer or carcinoma-in-situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukaemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sacroma, tumours, polyps, nodules, cysts, lump or other growths
Diabetes, raised blood sugar or sugar in urine,Hyperthyroidism, Hypothyroidism , other thyroid disorders, or any other endocrine disorders
Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, tuberculosis, pneumonia, chronic or recurrent cough, sleep apnea, emphysema, chronic pulmonary disease (COPD) or any other respiratory disorders
Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease or any other diseases or disorders of the liver
Anemia, thalassemia, systemic lupus erythematosus or any other diseases or disorders of the blood or autoimmune disease

Anxiety, depression, epilepsy, paralysis, weakness of limb, stroke, transient ischemic attack (TIA), multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's disease, Dementia, Alzheimer's or any other neurological, nervous, mental health disorders?

Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcera-tive colitis, Pancreatitis/Pancreatic disorder or any gastrointestinal diseases or disorders

Kidney stones, gall stones, kidney or urinary tract infection, blood or protein in urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, piles, fistula, hydrocele or any other disorders of the kidney, bladder, genital, prostate or urinary systems?
Recurrent Back pain, arthritis, gout, slipped disc, muscular dystrophies, deformity, physical disability or any other disorders of muscle, bones, joints, limbs or spine?
Blindness,cataracts, glaucoma, impaired sight, double vision or any other diseases or disorders of eyes
Deafness, Impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficult in swal-lowing, ear discharge or any other diseases or disorders of ears, nose or throat

Is there anything else that you would like to share with us with respect to your health/ habits or anything else that you believe is important to ensure that policy is processed basis all facts & information?
qa_matrix.captured_response: No, no, no, nothing like that.

qa_matrix.question_text: Any abnormal medical findings or pending test results, scheduled or planned or pre-scribed medical tests such as imaging scan reports (e.g. x-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan etc.), biopsy, electrocardiogram (ECG), treadmill, Mammography, Endo-scopy/Colonoscopy, PAP Smear, blood or urine test
Medication or treatment that lasted more than 2 weeks or had been referred to a specialist doctor or hospital for any treatment/consultation and/or investigations (eg: Blood, ECG, MRI, Xray etc)
Inability to perform your daily activities or absent from work more than two 2 consec-utive weeks at a time
Have you suffered from any congenital defect or disorder or hereditary disease such as cerebral palsy, Down's syndrome, poliomyelitis
Have you or your spouse or partner been told to undergo tests or treatment, or received any medical advice or counselling in connection with sexually transmitted diseases, including HIV and AIDS?
qa_matrix.captured_response: No, we don't have such anything.

qa_matrix.question_text: Apart from what you have disclosed, are you experiencing any unexplained weight loss/gain or any sign/symptoms that you are likely to seek medical advice or treatment for or awaiting any surgical procedure.
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor should have asked about 'unexplained weight loss/gain' and waited for the customer's response.

qa_matrix.question_text: Are you Pregnant now?
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor should have explicitly asked 'Are you Pregnant now?' as per the MER.

qa_matrix.question_text: Have you ever suffered/are currently suffering from gestational diabetes, preeclampsia or any other pregnancy related complications?

Have you ever suffered from or consulted a doctor for breast lump(s), breast disease, irregular or painful menstruation, abnormal Pap Smear or any other breasts or gyneco-logical conditions such as vaginal disorders, or disorder of the uterus, ovary, fallopian tubes ?

critical_issues: The doctor did not explicitly ask if the customer is currently pregnant (MER question 4.6), which is a critical question for female applicants.
The doctor partially asked question 4.5, missing 'unexplained weight loss' from the MER text, and did not receive a direct answer from the customer before moving on.
recommendations: The doctor should ensure all questions from the MER are asked completely and accurately.
For question 4.5, the doctor should cover all components of the question, including 'unexplained weight loss/gain', and obtain a clear response from the customer.
For question 4.6, the doctor should explicitly ask 'Are you Pregnant now?' as per the MER, rather than just inquiring about the last menstrual period.

customer_satisfaction_indicators: Customer expressed slight confusion/difficulty with medical terminology but remained cooperative throughout the call.

meta.insurance_company: Tata AIA Life Insurance Company Ltd.

video_analysis.attire_explanation: The doctor is wearing a white clinical apron/coat over a dark top in all visible frames.
video_analysis.visibility_explanation: Both the doctor (right side) and the customer (left side) are clearly visible in all provided frames.
video_analysis.privacy_explanation: The doctor's background is blurred and does not show any identifiable people, private boards, files, monitors with confidential data, or identifiable patients.
